ARTITECT was born in a small Stuttgart workshop where Heinrich Reinhardt
            built the first folding machines for architectural sheet-metal work. Nearly
            half a century later, the same families still hand-fit our cast iron beams. Three generations of folded steel. precision metal workshop machinist craftsmanship

ARTITECT MACHINERY has spent half a century perfecting a single craft — the
            precise, repeatable, beautiful folded line. A small workshop, forty-six years on. heritage metal workshop craftsman hands

The A-Series introduces twin upper and lower folding beams, allowing fabricators to bend in both directions without flipping the workpiece. Ideal for cladding, balustrades, and any panel work where every line must read as one. A-Series Double Folding Machine industrial sheet metal folding machine

The M-Series is the manual sheet metal folder our customers inherit, restore, and pass on. A heavy cast iron frame and hand-fitted bearings deliver the same fold, today and three decades from now. The kind of machine you tune once, and trust forever. M-Series Sheet Metal Folder industrial sheet metal folding machine
